description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and two above-ground stories, featuring large floor-to-ceiling windows and a clean, geometric facade. The structure is surrounded by landscaped elements, including a garden area with trees and shrubs, and a small covered outdoor space that could serve as a patio or gazebo. The front of the building has a prominent entryway, a garage door, and a fenced perimeter, providing both security and privacy. The rear and side elevations reveal additional windows and a mix of solid and glazed surfaces, enhancing natural light and visual openness. The exterior appears to be finished in a combination of smooth concrete or stucco, glass, and metal accents. The overall design emphasizes minimalism, functionality, and integration with outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and landscaped gardens, featuring a clean geometric design and a mix of concrete, glass, and metal finishes.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main building, a covered patio or gazebo, and landscaped garden with trees.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the entryway, garage door, large windows, and fenced perimeter.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with additional garden space, large windows, and a clear view of the flat roof.
description_view_3: Rear view dominated by dense shrubbery and a more private facade with grouped windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and floor-to-ceiling glazing
